text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ooooh. I'm getting nervous...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... might not be...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm the one who decided to run this race
and face Teio head-on...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It would be so embarrassing if I lose this. Not that
I think worrying about this is any less lame.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You always say that. Don't you have anything
better to say? Something more insightful?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Still... Thanks. I might not believe in myself...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But I'll try to remember that you have faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Employee
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um, yes, sure.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Employee
text_block_list.text: There has been a change in the runner list.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Employee
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio withdrew from the race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?! Teio's not running?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-why?

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Employee
text_block_list.text:
We don't know the details yet, but... it seems that
she recently injured herself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, no...

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Employee
text_block_list.text:
That's all I can say for now! Now, if you'll excuse
me...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No way... Teio isn't... competing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Is she okay? Was it really bad? What should I—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yikes. I'm getting all jumbled.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I can't! I was finally ready to face her...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gosh... What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Who should I chase after now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until this point, Nice Nature's target has been
beating Tokai Teio. I can understand her
confusion upon hearing the news, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't just run... Our plan was to follow
Teio...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I know, I know... But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is too fixated on running with Tokai
Teio right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having a goal to aim for is key to growth, but a
fixation on that goal leads to stagnation. To go
beyond that, she needs to broaden her sights.
choice_data_list: Run your way and make this race your own.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My own...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uuurgh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, that really got to me for a second. So
embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm honestly still shaken up... but I promise I'll run
a solid race...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm done being lame!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I will!
